_comment: Word Decoder content registry. Each root: { id, root, meaning, type, origin, mnemonic?, seed_examples, decode_words }. decode_words carry a 'parts' split of {id,text,meaning} (id = a root in this file when the morpheme is one we teach, else null) used for the novel-word decode challenge + ready-roots-only graduation. conceptIntro.examples[2] is the user-overridable Stage-0 slot.

examples.gloss: a colored body inside your cells

novelSplit.gloss: a tool to look at things far away

decode_words.gloss: the zone of Earth where life exists
heat coming from inside the earth
a device that keeps heat steady
a fear of bright light
a machine that draws a record of earthquakes
sensing feelings from far away
a harsh, unpleasant sound
a tool to examine the chest (listen inside)
a tool that measures air pressure
a living thing too small to see
a nutrient the body needs in large amounts
able to govern itself, working on its own
growing fish or plants in water
loud enough to be heard
not able to be seen
to carry something across a distance instantly
to say the opposite, to speak against
the underlying built systems a city runs on
to break something apart, throw into disorder
looking back at the past
to spoil the shape of something
a document written by hand
to pull back or take back
the path of a thrown object flying across
to lead someone into doing something
a storm that spins in a circle
a very precise instrument for measuring time
to remove the water from something
to cut into two equal parts
a set of three related stories
a very large number of things
to make many things into one
a 100-year anniversary
the physics of stars and space
a person who explores underwater
shaped so air moves over it with little force
a whole 3-D image drawn with light
a recorded tracing of the heartbeat
a spear with three prongs (teeth)
an animal that walks on four feet
to handle or control skillfully with the hands
lasting through many years
a sunny glass room for soaking up sun
beyond the moon
a being from beyond the Earth
relating to the sea and ships
crossing an entire continent
existing under the ground
faster than the speed of sound
between the galaxies
from before written history
to put off until after / later
loud and full of voice, noisy
an engine that moves itself from place to place
relating to feeling and the senses
a badge or mark showing rank
to move a bone out of its proper place
having all sides equal
done by one side only
to count off, list one by one
to break the path of light, bending it
an automatic bending-back reaction
a limb or part hanging off a body
to send out (light, heat, sound)
to swap the places of two things
to step away from the main topic
knowing everything
to breathe out for the last time, to end
standing still, not moving
untouched, whole, not damaged
to turn upside down
to bring back to life
rolled together, twisted and complicated
to seize someone's full attention
having an end or a limit
to make right, to straighten out
able to be chosen, qualified
to make smaller, to shrink
happening before birth
full of people, densely populated
the study of diseases
a device claimed to measure the mind
a fear of water
the element that produces water when burned
the study of the shape and form of things
an animal with jointed legs, like an insect
the simplest, earliest tiny animals
a flowing-in of many things at once
to remove poison from the body
a dangerous state of too much body heat
to shout praise toward someone
too ready to believe things

mnemonic.image_text: Picture tiny GERMs crawling all over your SKIN. Germ sounds like derm -> derm = skin.

decode_words.gloss: a needle that goes under the skin

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a CAR built entirely out of raw MEAT, dripping. Car -> carn = flesh.

decode_words.gloss: meat-eating

mnemonic.image_text: Picture your heart FILL up with warm LOVE until it overflows. Fill -> phil = love.

decode_words.gloss: a person who loves high-quality sound

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a boy: HE MOWS the lawn and red BLOOD sprays everywhere. He-mows -> hemo = blood.

decode_words.gloss: a condition where blood won't clot

mnemonic.image_text: Picture an AMBULANCE that grows legs and WALKS to the hospital. Ambulance -> ambul = walk.

decode_words.gloss: able to walk, not bedridden

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a creepy dark MALL where everything is BAD and broken. Mall -> mal = bad.

decode_words.gloss: bad or poor feeding, lack of good food

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a kind boy named BEN who does GOOD deeds all day. Ben -> bene = good.

decode_words.gloss: a blessing, saying good words over someone

mnemonic.image_text: Picture the CORE (center) of your BODY glowing. Core -> corp = body.

decode_words.gloss: to take into one body, to combine

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a MORTICIAN in a dark funeral home surrounded by DEATH. Mort -> mort = death.

decode_words.gloss: to embarrass so badly you could die

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a shepherd named GREG gathering a big FLOCK of sheep. Greg -> greg = flock.

decode_words.gloss: liking to be in a group, very social

mnemonic.image_text: Picture someone TALKing nonstop in a LOW, COOL voice you can't shut off. Lo-cu -> loqu = talk.

decode_words.gloss: very talkative, full of talk

mnemonic.image_text: Picture catching SOME Zzz's -> SOMN. Someone fast asleep counting sheep. Somn = sleep.

decode_words.gloss: not being able to sleep

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a judge stamping VERY TRUE on a paper. Very -> ver = truth.

decode_words.gloss: to check that something is true

mnemonic.image_text: Picture giant SCISSORS snipping everything in half. Sciss -> cis = cut.

decode_words.gloss: a clean cut made into something (surgery)

mnemonic.image_text: Picture yelling CONGRATS! and feeling THANKFUL and happy. Grat = thankful.

decode_words.gloss: to work your way into someone's good favor

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a HIPPO hiding UNDER the water, only its eyes showing. Hippo -> hypo = under.

decode_words.gloss: dangerously low body heat

mnemonic.image_text: Picture two ICE cubes exactly the SAME size. ICE-oh -> iso = equal.

decode_words.gloss: having equal measurements

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a glowing LIT-up STONE in a cave. Lit -> lith = stone.

decode_words.gloss: one huge single block of stone

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a bright NEON sign flashing NEW! NEW! NEW! Neon -> neo = new.

decode_words.gloss: the New Stone Age

mnemonic.image_text: Picture roasting a PIE over roaring FIRE. Pie-ro -> pyro = fire.

decode_words.gloss: the art of fireworks

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a RHINO with a giant horn on its NOSE. Rhino = nose.

decode_words.gloss: the animal with a horn on its nose

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a WISE old owl sitting on a SOFA giving advice. Sofa -> soph = wise.

decode_words.gloss: the love of wisdom

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a mysterious FOREIGN stranger in a ZEN garden you've never met. Zen -> xen = stranger.

decode_words.gloss: a fear of strangers or foreigners

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a CHIEF king standing proudly under a giant stone ARCH. Arch = ruler.

decode_words.gloss: rule by one person, like a king

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a giant BIBLE, the biggest BOOK on the shelf. Bible -> bibl = book.

decode_words.gloss: a written list of books used

mnemonic.image_text: Picture floating in the COSMOS with all the stars of the UNIVERSE around you. Cosmos -> cosm = universe.

decode_words.gloss: a tiny world that mirrors the whole universe

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a huge crowd and you point: 'all of THEM!' Them -> dem = people.

decode_words.gloss: a disease spreading upon the people

mnemonic.image_text: Picture huge FANGS chomping and EATing everything. Fang -> phag = eat.

decode_words.gloss: a cell that eats germs and debris

mnemonic.image_text: Picture looking up and saying 'THEE, oh mighty GOD.' Thee-oh -> theo = god.

decode_words.gloss: the study of God and religion

mnemonic.image_text: Picture shiny CHROME on a car reflecting every COLOR of the rainbow. Chrome -> chrom = color.

decode_words.gloss: made of only one color

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a CAT tumbling DOWN a long staircase. Cat-a -> cata = down.

decode_words.gloss: a machine that hurls objects

mnemonic.image_text: Picture an EPIC hero standing UPON a mountain top. Epic -> epi = upon.

decode_words.gloss: the outer layer upon the skin

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a glowing SAINT in a HOLY, SACRED temple. Saint -> sanct = holy.

decode_words.gloss: a holy, safe place

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a MAGNIFYing glass making everything look GREAT and LARGE. Magn = great.

decode_words.gloss: having a great, generous spirit

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a cartoon ANIMAL springing to LIFE and moving. Animal -> anim = life.

decode_words.gloss: not alive, without life

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a girl named LUCY holding a bright LAMP of LIGHT. Luc = light.

decode_words.gloss: letting light through, semi-see-through

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a metronome ticking TEMPO, counting TIME. Tempo -> tempor = time.

decode_words.gloss: relating to time
the study of the nerves and brain
a fake name a writer uses
someone who speaks many languages
a long speech by one person
putting separate parts together into a whole
a blood protein that fights against germs
an animal that eats all kinds of food
an animal that eats plants
a chemical that kills weeds and plants
a tree that bears cones
to come together for a meeting
to go before something else
holding on tightly, stubborn
to shut away, apart from others
to drive or force someone to act
to climb down
unable to be dissolved
to squeeze tight, make narrower
a clashing, unpleasant mix of sounds
the sac around the heart
the first model of something new
the study of living things and their environment
to cut off the head
judging before you know the facts
lying after swearing to tell the truth

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a brand NEW ROW of glowing NERVES lighting up your arm. New-row -> neuro = nerve.

decode_words.gloss: a chemical that sends signals between nerves

mnemonic.image_text: Picture an OYSTER with a shell as hard as BONE. Oyster -> oste = bone.

decode_words.gloss: a disease of weak, porous bones

mnemonic.image_text: Picture painful GAS bubbling in your STOMACH. Gas -> gastr = stomach.

decode_words.gloss: inflammation of the stomach

mnemonic.image_text: Picture HE PATs his side, right where his LIVER is. He-pat -> hepat = liver.

decode_words.gloss: inflammation of the liver

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a warning sign: NEVER FRY your KIDNEY. Never-fry -> nephr = kidney.

decode_words.gloss: the study of the kidneys

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a building SITE where each brick is a tiny living CELL. Site -> cyt = cell.

decode_words.gloss: the study of cells

mnemonic.image_text: Picture winning a giant TROPHY for GROWING big and strong. Trophy -> troph = growth.

decode_words.gloss: wasting away from lack of growth or use

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a tight knot coming LOOSE and BREAKING apart. Loose -> lys = break down.

decode_words.gloss: loss of movement, the muscles 'break down'

mnemonic.image_text: Picture soft PLASTIC being MOLDED into any shape. Plastic -> plasm = molded form.

decode_words.gloss: the jelly-like material filling a cell

mnemonic.image_text: Picture GREEN CLOROX (chlorine) staining everything bright green. Clor -> chlor = green.

decode_words.gloss: the green stuff in leaves that catches light

mnemonic.image_text: Picture an ANT dressed as a tiny HUMAN person walking on two legs. Ant-thrope -> anthrop = human.

decode_words.gloss: the study of humans and their cultures

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a CRAZY king RULING with total power. Crazy -> cracy = rule.

decode_words.gloss: rule by one person with total power

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a caterpillar CHANGING into a butterfly, going BEYOND what it was. Meta = change.

decode_words.gloss: a complete change of shape, like caterpillar to butterfly

mnemonic.image_text: Picture two identical HOMER twins, exactly the SAME. Homo = same.

decode_words.gloss: words with the same sound but different meanings

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a drawer of OTHER, all-DIFFERENT mismatched socks. Hetero = different.

decode_words.gloss: made of many different kinds mixed together

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a loyal dog named FIDO you completely TRUST. Fido -> fid = trust.

decode_words.gloss: to trust someone enough to share a secret

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a huge BELL clanging to start a WAR. Bell = war.

decode_words.gloss: hostile and aggressive, ready to fight

mnemonic.image_text: Picture a CALM, pleasant dinner, everyone happy at their PLACEMAT. Plac = calm / please.

decode_words.gloss: to calm someone down, make them pleased

mnemonic.image_text: Picture stacks of DOCUMENTS (docs) full of people's BELIEFS. Docs -> dox = belief.

decode_words.gloss: holding the correct, traditional beliefs

mnemonic.image_text: Picture you OR-THROW a crooked stick again and again until it lands STRAIGHT. Or-throw -> ortho = straight.

decode_words.gloss: a dentist who straightens teeth
